Singer(s): G.V. Prakash Kumar

Edhai Ninaithom
adhai adaindhom
adaindha pinnae
unmayai naam unarndhom. (2)

Edhai Ninaithom
adhai adaindhom
adaindha pinnae
unmayai naam unarndhom.

Aasayil yaeri
megaththil ponom.
kuyil muttai melae
kaakkaigal aanom.

pul nuni meedhae
thoongidum paniyai
rasiththaal.
minnalin oliyin meedhu
konda mayakkam vilagidumey.

Kidaithadhai enni
vazhdhidum vazhvai rasiththaal.
Jannalin kadhavai theendi
pudhiya velichcham
veesidumey.

Edhai Ninaithom

unmayai naam unarndhom.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Edhai Ninaithom'?

The song conveys feelings of longing and the struggles of life, reflecting on unfulfilled desires.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie 'Kaakka Muttai'?

In the movie, the song highlights the emotional journey of the characters as they navigate their dreams and realities.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by GV Prakash Kumar, who is also the music director.

When was 'Edhai Ninaithom' released?

The song was released on May 8, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Edhai Ninaithom', GV Prakash Kumar delivers a haunting melody that resonates with the theme of unfulfilled dreams and nostalgia. The song reflects the struggles and aspirations of the characters in Kaakka Muttai, evoking a sense of longing and melancholy. Its poignant lyrics and soulful composition create an emotional atmosphere that lingers with the listener. This track stands out as a heartfelt expression of life's complexities and desires.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Edhai Ninaithom from Kaakka Muttai captures the essence of longing and nostalgia with GV Prakash Kumar's soulful rendition. The song beautifully intertwines heartfelt lyrics with a poignant melody, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema. Experience the emotional depth of this track that resonates with anyone who has ever yearned for something lost.
stanzaMeanings: We thought about something and we found it, after that we realized the truth.
There are no limits to desires. If we pursue them, life will be lost.
There is no one who desires only. Today, that is what you understood, dear.
New new efforts will arise. Day by day, sleep will be taken away.
Opening the mind, it will enjoy what is present.
We thought about something and we found it, after that we realized the truth.
We go up in desire to the clouds. We become crows over the cuckoo's egg.
If we enjoy the dew on the grass, the illusion of lightning will fade away.
If we think about what we have received and enjoy life, a new light will blow through the door of heaven.
We thought about something and we found it, after that we realized the truth.
There are no limits to desires. If we pursue them, life will be lost.
